mapper.select:
SELECT id, tcm_prescription_id, name_zh, pinyin_name, source, indications_zh, indications_en, effects, effects_zh FROM tcm_prescriptions
AND ( name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{source}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, tcm_prescription_id, name_zh, pinyin_name, source, indications_zh, indications_en, effects, effects_zh FROM tcm_prescriptions WHERE tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId}

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN prescription_core_herb_rel pr ON h.tcm_herb_id = pr.tcm_herb_id WHERE pr.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN prescription_core_herb_rel pr ON h.tcm_herb_id = pr.tcm_herb_id WHERE pr.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb2_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM other_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN prescription_other_herb_rel pr ON h.tcm_herb2_id = pr.tcm_herb2_id WHERE pr.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT d.id, d.disease_id AS diseaseId, d.disease_name AS diseaseName, d.source FROM diseases d INNER JOIN prescription_disease_rel pd ON d.disease_id = pd.disease_id WHERE pd.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY d.id ASC

SELECT s.id, s.tcm_symptom_id AS tcmSymptomId, s.symptom_name_zh AS symptomNameZh, s.symptom_pinyin AS symptomPinyin, s.symptom_definition AS symptomDefinition, s.symptom_locus AS symptomLocus, s.symptom_property AS symptomProperty, s.type FROM tcm_symptoms s INNER JOIN prescription_symptom_rel ps ON s.tcm_symptom_id = ps.tcm_symptom_id WHERE ps.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT s.id, s.tcm_syndrome_id AS tcmSyndromeId, s.syndrome_name_zh AS syndromeNameZh, s.syndrome_english AS syndromeEnglish, s.syndrome_pinyin AS syndromePinyin, s.syndrome_definition_zh AS syndromeDefinitionZh, s.syndrome_description_en AS syndromeDescriptionEn, s.category_zh AS categoryZh, s.category_en AS categoryEn, s.source FROM tcm_syndromes s INNER JOIN prescription_syndrome_rel ps ON s.tcm_syndrome_id = ps.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE ps.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT mc.id, mc.med_case_id AS medCaseId, mc.case_report AS caseReport, mc.physician, mc.tcm_disease AS tcmDisease, mc.wm_disease AS wmDisease, mc.tcm_symptoms AS tcmSymptoms, mc.wm_symptoms AS wmSymptoms, mc.urination_defecation AS urinationDefecation, mc.pulse_condition AS pulseCondition, mc.tongue_appearance AS tongueAppearance, mc.tcm_syndrome AS tcmSyndrome, mc.tcm_treatment AS tcmTreatment, mc.prescription, mc.herb_composition AS herbComposition, mc.created_at AS createdAt, mc.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM medical_cases mc INNER JOIN medical_case_prescription_rel mcpr ON mc.med_case_id = mcpr.med_case_id WHERE mcpr.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY mc.id ASC

SELECT pt.id, pt.tcm_prescription_id AS tcmPrescriptionId, pt.gene_name AS geneName, pt.log2_fc_avg AS log2FcAvg, pt.p_value AS pValue, pt.direction, pt.source, CASE WHEN ABS(pt.log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND pt.p_value < 0.05 THEN 'significant' ELSE 'not_significant' END AS significance, CASE WHEN pt.p_value < 0.001 THEN '***' WHEN pt.p_value < 0.01 THEN '**' WHEN pt.p_value < 0.05 THEN '*' ELSE 'ns' END AS significanceLabel FROM prescription_transcriptomics pt WHERE pt.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY ABS(pt.log2_fc_avg) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS upregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS downregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantUpregulated, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantDownregulated, MAX(ABS(log2_fc_avg)) AS maxAbsLog2Fc, MIN(p_value) AS minPValue FROM prescription_transcriptomics WHERE tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId}

SELECT h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, ht.gene_name AS geneName, ht.log2_fc_avg AS log2FcAvg, ht.p_value AS pValue, ht.direction, ht.source, CASE WHEN ABS(ht.log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND ht.p_value < 0.05 THEN 'significant' ELSE 'not_significant' END AS significance FROM prescription_core_herb_rel pchr INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON pchr.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id INNER JOIN herb_transcriptomics ht ON h.tcm_herb_id = ht.tcm_herb_id WHERE pchr.tcm_prescription_id = #{tcmPrescriptionId} ORDER BY h.herb_name_zh, ABS(ht.log2_fc_avg) DESC
